//: VS Code extension host type-check. Compiles the shell (extension.ts + provider + vscode adapters) AND, transitively through @prose-minion/core, core's TS source — so it inherits base's full path table (the public boundary is enforced by the eslint no-restricted-imports rule, not by tsc resolution). @types/vscode comes from app devDeps. module/resolution mirror PM's pre-move host config (commonjs/node).
